title: tragacantha angustata
intro: Tragacantha angustata, also known as Needle Spurge or Tragacanth, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its sap, which contains a thick, protective gum called tragacanth, used to soothe digestive issues and wounds. Tragacantha angustata has been used to treat various health problems, including diarrhea, ulcers, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical applications, which can be used to create remedies for digestive and skin issues.
